description: Phase 1.5 - Engineering, Accessibility and Performance: Add proper skip-to-content link, ensure all interactive elements have visible focus indicators meeting WCAG 2.2 AA, add focus-visible ring utility, audit and fix any missing alt text or ARIA labels, add proper meta viewport and color-scheme, and ensure responsive breakpoints are properly utilized. Fix the 2 existing lint warnings.
steps: Fix the 2 existing lint warnings in app/components/SearchFilters.tsx (unused GENRE_OPTIONS and YEAR_OPTIONS variables - remove them or prefix with underscore if needed for future use)

Add a skip-to-content link as the first focusable element in app/layout.tsx body. It should be visually hidden but appear on focus. Link target: main content area with id='main-content'. Style: fixed top-left, bg-foreground text-background, rounded, z-[100].

Add a global focus-visible utility in globals.css: a .focus-ring class and a global *:focus-visible rule that adds a 2px ring offset with ring color of --primary or --foreground. This ensures all interactive elements have visible focus indicators per WCAG 2.2 AA.

In app/layout.tsx, add id='main-content' to the main content wrapper div (the div with className 'relative z-10 flex min-h-full flex-col'). Also add <meta name='color-scheme' content='light dark' /> in the head.
Audit and add aria-label to the main landmark elements. Ensure the <main> in app/page.tsx has role='main'. Ensure all pages' main content areas use <main> element with appropriate aria-label.
Add prefers-reduced-motion: reduce media query that disables all CSS animations and transitions universally (enhance the existing one which only targets some animations)
Run 'bun run lint' and 'bun run build' to confirm everything passes with 0 errors and 0 warnings
acceptance_criteria: bun run lint passes with 0 errors AND 0 warnings
Skip-to-content link is present and works on Tab press
All interactive elements have visible focus indicators (focus-visible ring)
main content has proper id for skip link target
findings: Lint passes with 0 errors and 0 warnings after removing unused GENRE_OPTIONS and YEAR_OPTIONS. Build succeeds. The prefers-reduced-motion query uses 0.01ms instead of 0ms for animation-duration to avoid browser quirks where 0ms is sometimes ignored. The focus-visible rule uses --primary color variable for the outline. The skip-to-content link uses sr-only plus focus:not-sr-only pattern for visibility toggle.
